title: Highlights and goals from Australia 2-0 Turkey at the 2026 FIFA World Cup | 06/14/2026
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(jsonld:articleBody) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text: Australia heads into this World Cup with the clear goal of matching—or even surpassing—its performance at Qatar 2022, where it reached the Round of 16, leaving a competitive and surprising impression on the world. However, its current form raises some concerns. The Socceroos have had a less-than-stellar run in their most recent friendly matches, with two wins (against Cameroon and Curaçao), two losses (against Colombia and Mexico), and one draw (1-1 against Switzerland).Despite this, the 1-1 draw against Switzerland in their last warm-up match left a more positive impression, showing a slight improvement in their defensive structure and ability to react. The Australian team is undergoing a generational transition, with new players beginning to take center stage in a system that prioritizes tactical organization, physical intensity, and collective discipline. This World Cup debut represents an opportunity to demonstrate that, regardless of recent results, Australia remains a tough and competitive team that aims to excel beyond its own confederation.
